craigslist.title: HUGE*1BED_BALCONY_SHORE_ROAD_VIEW_VERROZANO_BRIDGE
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Bay Ridge Waterfront Living Wake up to breathtaking water views from every room in this spacious 900 SF one-bedroom apartment overlooking Shore Road. ✨ Apartment Features • Spacious 1 Bedroom • Water & Verrazzano Bridge views from every room • Bright, sun-filled living room • Large foyer perfect for dining or entertaining • Renovated bathroom • Beautiful hardwood floors • Five closets, including a California-style bedroom closet 🏢 Building Amenities • Well-maintained co-op • Live-in superintendent • Full-time porter • Evening & weekend doormen • Renovated lobby, elevators & laundry room • Key fob entry & new intercom system • Package room • Bike storage • Garage (waitlist) • Small pets welcome 📍 Prime Bay Ridge Location • Steps from the Shore Road Promenade • Waterfront parks, bike paths, tennis courts, playgrounds & ballfields • Close to Third Avenue restaurants, shopping & nightlife • Express bus to Manhattan right outside the building • R train at 95th Street just 3 blocks away • Public parking across the street 📞 Contact Benson Realty to schedule your private showing. 646 718 5199
